personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | AWS Data Pipelines | SQL & Python

summary: Data Engineer with strong hands-on experience designing and operating ETL/ELT pipelines, SQL-driven data models, and analytics workflows in enterprise environments. Deep Python and SQL foundation with proven delivery of reliable data pipelines, quality checks, and performance-focused reporting. Production cloud experience in AWS (Glue, Athena, S3) with a practical, collaborative approach to cross-functional delivery.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained automated ETL/ELT pipelines (Python, Pandas, SQL) ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints for analytics and reporting use cases.
Designed and optimized data models for historical retention, trend analysis, and business reporting in a regulated enterprise environment.
Implemented data quality checks, cleansing, and anomaly validation to improve pipeline trust and downstream reliability.
Automated recurring reporting workflows and reduced manual effort through scripted pipeline/process improvements.
Collaborated with business and technical stakeholders to translate reporting needs into scalable, supportable data solutions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported AWS migration efforts and monitoring modernization for business-critical systems.
Analyzed telemetry and performance data to identify bottlenecks and guide optimization decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led large-scale data migration from 200+ MySQL nodes to Oracle RAC with strong focus on integrity and performance.
Built testing and validation workflows to support safe migration cutovers and stable operations.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Designed dashboards, alerts, and extraction scripts that improved issue detection and operational response.
Partnered across teams to troubleshoot root causes and improve platform performance.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed performance analysis and capacity testing using structured SQL-based metrics and automation scripts.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed and optimized AWS data workflows using S3, Glue, and Athena with practical ETL improvements.

projects.name: HorizonScale Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built reliable forecasting data pipelines and reduced manual cycle time for capacity planning.
